examples.title: Basic select
examples.description: Native select with label and bound string value.

examples.title: Select with disabled option
examples.description: Individual options can be marked disabled.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Select } from 'cinder/select';
  const options = [
    { value: 'free', label: 'Free' },
    { value: 'pro', label: 'Pro' },
    { value: 'enterprise', label: 'Enterprise (contact sales)', disabled: true },
  ];

  let plan = $state(options[0]?.value ?? 'free');
</script>

<Select id="plan" bind:value={plan} {options} label="Plan" />
